features.name: notification-core
features.description: The central Apprise engine that manages notification dispatch, URL parsing, plugin loading, and multi-target delivery orchestration.

flows.name: send-sms-via-octopush
flows.description: User sends an SMS notification through the Octopush gateway to phone numbers or email recipients.

flows.name: add-notification-server
flows.description: User adds notification service URLs, plugin instances, or config objects to an Apprise instance before sending.

flows.name: load-notification-config
flows.description: User loads notification targets from a file, HTTP URL, or in-memory config so Apprise can resolve servers at send time.

flows.name: attach-file-to-notification
flows.description: User attaches local files, remote HTTP resources, or in-memory data to be included with an outgoing notification.

flows.name: define-notification-groups-flow
flows.description: User organizes targets into named groups in a config file for selective dispatching.

flows.name: send-notification-with-attachments-flow
flows.description: User sends a notification with one or more attachments to a supporting plugin.

flows.name: register-custom-notify-handler
flows.description: Developer decorates a function with @notify to register a custom protocol handler that Apprise will invoke when that schema is triggered.

bug_fix_prs.title: Inproved azure:// error handling and message responses (#1499)
bug_fix_prs.author: Chris Caron

bug_fix_prs.title: fix(fcm): add apns-push-type header for reliable iOS delivery (#1577)
bug_fix_prs.author: Alberto Lanaro

bug_fix_prs.title: resolved 'file can not be opened for read' AttachMemory issue (#1553)
bug_fix_prs.author: Chris Caron

bug_fix_prs.title: Revert "ntfy:// Header X-Tags not honored workaround (#1524)" (#1525)
bug_fix_prs.author: Chris Caron

bug_fix_prs.title: fix parsing of USA callsigns--specifically different prefix/suffix counts like 1x2 and 1x3 calls (#1418)
bug_fix_prs.author: Neil Hanlon

bug_fix_prs.title: fix(telegram): support <code> blocks wrapped in <pre> for syntax highlighting (#1423)
bug_fix_prs.author: David

features.name: push-notifications
features.description: Mobile and desktop push notification plugins including FCM, ntfy, and other push delivery services.

flows.name: send-device-push-via-pushbullet
flows.description: User sends a push notification to devices, channels, or contacts through the Pushbullet service.

flows.name: send-push-via-pushover
flows.description: User sends a prioritized push notification with optional sound and device targeting through Pushover.

flows.name: send-wechat-notification-via-pushplus
flows.description: User sends a notification through PushPlus to WeChat or other channels, optionally targeting a group topic.

flows.name: send-encrypted-push-via-simplepush
flows.description: User sends an AES-encrypted push notification through the SimplePush service using a private key.

flows.name: send-push-to-devices-or-topics-via-pushy
flows.display_name: Send Push to Devices or Topics Via Pushy
flows.description: User sends a push notification to one or more registered devices or topic subscribers through the Pushy service.

flows.name: send-wechat-push-via-wxpusher
flows.description: User sends a push notification to WeChat users or topic subscribers through the WxPusher platform.

flows.name: send-push-via-token-based-providers
flows.display_name: Send Push Via Token Based Providers
flows.description: User sends a push notification through a token-authenticated provider (PushDeer, Pushed, Pushjet, PushMe, PushSafer, SpugPush, or TechulusPush).

bug_fix_prs.title: resolved 'file can not be opened for read' AttachMemory issue (#1553)
bug_fix_prs.author: Chris Caron

features.name: email-notifications
features.description: Send notifications via email using SMTP, supporting HTML/text bodies, attachments, and various provider shortcuts.

flows.name: configure-email-provider
flows.description: User specifies an email address and the plugin auto-matches it against known provider templates to pre-populate SMTP settings.

flows.name: send-email-notification
flows.description: User triggers an email notification that is composed and delivered to one or more recipients via SMTP.

bug_fix_prs.title: fixed issue with mailto:// when using yahoo.com (#1561)
bug_fix_prs.author: Chris Caron

bug_fix_prs.title: fix: Display SMTP host in debug mode (#1331)
bug_fix_prs.author: Emmanuel Ferdman

features.name: cli
features.description: Command-line interface for sending notifications, loading configs, and managing targets without writing code.

flows.name: send-notification
flows.description: User invokes the CLI to send a push notification to one or more services via URLs or config files.

features.name: chat-notifications
features.description: Send notifications to team chat platforms including Slack, Mattermost, Discord, Google Chat, Rocket.Chat, and Microsoft Teams.

flows.name: send-google-chat-notification
flows.description: User sends a notification message to a Google Chat room via an incoming webhook URL.

flows.name: send-rocketchat-notification
flows.description: User sends a notification message to a Rocket.Chat channel or user via webhook, token, or basic authentication.

flows.name: authenticate-rocketchat-session
flows.description: User authenticates with a Rocket.Chat server using username and password credentials before sending notifications.

features.name: auth
features.description: Authentication and account access — sign-in, sign-up, password recovery, email verification, session management.

flows.name: authenticate-social-account-flow
flows.description: User provides OAuth tokens or API keys to authorize Apprise to post on their behalf.
